title: Pufferfish inflating near Reef Coloring Page

seoDescription: Color a realistic spiky pufferfish inflated near coral reef structures. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: They have four fused teeth that grow continuously, forming a strong beak capable of crushing hard clams and crabs.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing smooth gradient shading using fine-tip gel pens.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about marine habitats and ocean conservation while developing fine motor coordination.
